mapper.insert: insert into clazz (name, room, begin_date, end_date, master_id, subject, create_time, update_time) values (#{name}, #{room}, #{beginDate}, #{endDate}, #{masterId}, #{subject}, now(), now())
mapper.select: select c.*, e.name as masterName from clazz c left join emp e on c.master_id = e.id where c.id = #{id}
select c.*, e.name as masterName from clazz c left join emp e on c.master_id = e.id
